name: Apple Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the contents of the Stouffer's packaged apples into a blender.
2. Add ice cubes, orange juice, grenadine syrup (with 1-1/2 teaspoons), lemon juice, and rum to the blender.
3. Blend on high speed for 1-2 minutes until smooth.
4. Pour the apple mixture into chilled glasses.
5. If desired, top with a dollop of whipped cream.
NOTE: The Apple Ice can be made up to 1 hour in advance and kept in the freezer until ready to serve.
